case_title: JESSE JAMES HENRY VS. CFS FIRE PROTECTION INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CFS FIRE PROTECTION INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENRY, JESSE JAMES DBA SUPERIOR AUTOMOTIVE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CFS FIRE PROTECTION INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY HENRY, JESSE JAMES DBA SUPERIOR AUTOMOTIVE AS TO DEFENDANT CFS FIRE PROTECTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-11-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-28-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-06-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEREMY BATEMAN--VICE PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $80.00 - SERVED MAY-13-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CFS FIRE PROTECTION INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DRAKE RICE--EMPLOYEE, ACCOUNT MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEREMY BATEMAN--VICE PRESIDENT/BROTHER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
